message: Every engine command rendered for Codex (.agents/skills/engine-*) must keep its operator-only protection: the companion agents/openai.yaml with policy.allow_implicit_invocation: false, so the assistant can never start the command on its own — the same self-election safety the Claude-side skills carry via their own flag. This check goes red when an engine Codex command ships without that companion or with the policy loosened. To fix: regenerate the render (uv run --directory .engine --frozen -- python tools/codex_gen.py generate) or restore the policy file.
